revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-2-125

Direction finding group

A number of direction finders separated from each other by distances sufficiently great to allow the position of a transmitter to be determined from simultaneous observations at each of the direction finders.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Direction finding network}}
